items.example: Up to forty percent of our actions are done out of habit.
Build your new habit into your existing routine.
It takes determination to see a new habit through.
Consistency is the key to building new habits.
Make a time commitment you can stick to.
It takes about thirty days to build a new habit.
It's hard to stick to a new routine.
If you miss a day, get back on track the next day.
Reward yourself after reaching your target.
Don't get into an all-or-nothing mindset.
